initial_draft:

```

<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering a trade that benefits me. I have nothing to lose by accepting and will gain $8. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```

</critique>
